title: A's Apocalypses: shroom doom
description: a spreading overgrowth of mushrooms threatens your world.
body: Adds Megalium, a more powerful and virulent version of mycelium, which will spawn in temperate biomes and spread across the surface, rotting out overworld trees and growing mushrooms in their place. Needless to say, do not use this mod unless you are okay with your surface being irreversibly overtaken by fungi.
